title: New York, Maryland and Utah to hold primaries with crypto PAC money hanging over voters
summary: Crypto-backed PACs disclosed spending more than $8 million on media to support candidates in three US states, as some Maryland Democrats have called on one candidate to reject “outside spending from crypto billionaires.”

title: Solana grabs 95% of tokenized equity as traders debate if SOL bottom is in
summary: Solana captured 95% of tokenized equity volumes as analysts debate whether $60 was the bottom for SOL.

title: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Lifeline to Tehran as Talks Proceed
summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Buys $34.9 Million of Bitcoin Using Common Stock
summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. bought $39.4 million of Bitcoin, leaning again on its common stock to fund purchases of the cryptocurrency for a third consecutive week despite earlier pledges to pivot to perpetual preferred shares.

title: Crypto Industry Unites Behind Bill to Fix Tax Rules for Miners and Stakers
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Crypto Industry Unites Behind Bill to Fix Tax Rules for Miners and Stakers
U.S. crypto groups are urging Congress to pass H.R. 9175, which would let miners and stakers defer taxes until assets are sold instead of taxing rewards at receipt.

title: BitMine, Sharplink, Joe Lubin Back New Ethereum Research and Development Lab
summary: Some of Ethereum's largest holders are coming together to fund a new research and development lab aimed at boosting the network and ETH.

title: Trump Orders Acceleration of Quantum Readiness as Bitcoin Faces Coming Risk
summary: President Donald Trump signed two executive orders aimed at expanding U.S. quantum computing capabilities and speeding the transition to quantum-resistant encryption.

title: Solana treasury firm Solmate’s largest stakeholder sues board for self-dealing, fiduciary breaches
summary: Board members Ron Sade and Keren Maimon personally bought about 2.298 million SLMT shares at $4.97, diluting shareholders ~20%.

title: Bitmine, SharpLink and Joe Lubin back Ethlabs nonprofit to advance Ethereum’s ‘next phase’ of growth
summary: Ethlabs, backed by Joe Lubin and the two largest ETH DATs, Bitmine and SharpLink, will focus on institutional adoption.

title: Burnham poised to succeed Starmer as UK prime minister
summary: Outgoing Greater Manchester mayor gears up for talks with civil service as he prepares to enter Number 10 within weeks

title: The revolving door of Downing Street
summary: To survive longer than Keir Starmer, Andy Burnham will need vision and a plan
